headline: Will Keytruda Continue to Aid MRK's Growth in 2026 After a Strong Q1?

headline: Assessing Merck (MRK) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: Merck overview and recent performance snapshot Merck (MRK) stock is drawing attention after a stretch of mixed returns, with a gain of 0.98% over the past day but declines of 0.69% over the past week and 7.45% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Merck.
